summary: Reframed the opening so chapter 18 no longer repeats chapter 17's trunk-at-dawn handoff image verbatim, while preserving the same departure action, tone, and chapter beats. No exit rewrite was made because the provided boundary context included no next-chapter opening to match against.
edits: Shifted the opening paragraph to begin on the stripped houses of Kadam Char instead of repeating the prior chapter's dawn trunk handoff.
Reintroduced Halima and Nura carrying the trunk within the same opening paragraph so the departure continuity remains intact.
Confirmed the available style bible excerpt contained no example_lines requiring replacement.
